name: recollect-uitest
description: Quarantined Playwright UI/end-to-end harness for the Recollect web client. NOT part of the Rust cargo workspace under app/ — its Node deps must never touch the engine graph (mirrors how tools/cardpipe is its own root). Drives the BUILT site (make site -> dist/) in a real headless browser, automating the feasible checks from docs/manual_verification.md.
